implementedBehavior: model:check now defaults to CODEX_CLI_MODEL_CHECK_SOURCE=cli, which uses the logged-in Codex CLI session instead of OPENAI_API_KEY.
CLI mode runs a read-only codex exec probe with --json, --model <model>, -a never, --skip-git-repo-check, and --ephemeral.
The default probe model is gpt-5.4-mini and can be overridden with CODEX_CLI_MODEL_CHECK_MODEL.
Official /models catalog drift checking remains available through CODEX_CLI_MODEL_CHECK_SOURCE=catalog.
Command output is ASCII to avoid Windows console mojibake while docs and chat can remain localized.
limitations: No live Codex CLI model probe was executed during validation.
No live OpenAI /models catalog request was executed during validation.
A real strict CLI probe should be run only with explicit operator approval because it uses the logged-in Codex account.
